result.stdout:
Usage:
  incursa-schema --provider <sqlserver|postgres> --connection-string <value> [--schema <name>] [--include-control-plane]

Options:
  -p, --provider             Required. sqlserver or postgres.
  -c, --connection-string    Required. Database connection string.
  -s, --schema               Optional. Defaults to infra.
      --include-control-plane Optional. Also apply control-plane bundle.
  -h, --help                 Show usage.

commands.payload:

      --include-control-plane Optional. Also apply control-plane bundle.
  -h, --help                 Show usage.
